The '''''Talon''''' was an [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance]]. It was part of the group of reinforcements that were pulled out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peregrine'']] and was [[Ambush in the Derilyn system|destroyed]] along with the rest of the group by the Rebels.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
